decisions.rationale: Observation describes the 116th Street Study Area in Manhattan on 116th Street, Manhattan Avenue, Pleasant Avenue, and Morningside Avenue, matching the existing corridor_116th-street record which has the same streets, borough, and display name '116th Street Study Area, Manhattan'. The same source (cb11_mar2025) is already present in the registry card's source_ids.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Study area: 116 th St., Manhattan Av., Pleasant Av., and Morningside Av. between 114 th St. & 113 th St. – Total: 2.2 miles
